feat.name: Envenom Fangs
feat.text: You envenom your fangs. If the next fangs Strike you make before the end of your next turn hits and deals damage, the Strike deals an additional 1d6 persistent poison damage. The poison becomes inert after you hit, or at the end of your next turn, whichever comes first.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.
